zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Everard於1404年出生在英國艾可馬申波利時，她的父親William Everard I29歲，母親Agnes Cornish25歲。她於1424年與George Henry Pope在英國英格蘭素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Everard于1404年出生在英国艾可馬申波利时，她的父亲William Everard I29岁，母亲Agnes Cornish25岁。她于1424年与George Henry Pope在英国英格兰素福爾可米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Everard was born in 1404, in Mashbury, Essex, England, her father, William Everard I, was 29 and her mother, Agnes Cornish, was 25. She married George Henry Pope in 1424, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1469, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Everard est née en 1404, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Everard I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cornish, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé George Henry Pope en 1424, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Everard 1404 in Mashbury, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Everard I 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes Cornish 25. Sie hat 1424 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom George Henry Pope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Everard è nata il nel 1404 nel Mashbury, Essex, England, sua padre, William Everard I, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes Cornish, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato George Henry Pope nel 1424, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1469, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Everardが1404年にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父William Everard Iは29歳，母Agnes Cornishは25歳であった。1424年にイギリスイギリススフォルクミルデンハルでGeorge Henry Popeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Everard(이)가 1404년 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Everard I(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Cornish(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 미데홀에서 George Henry Pope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Everard родилась в 1404 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Everard I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cornish, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Henry Pope в 1424 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.
